title: Salvation archives: Lobotomy REMAKE
description: A remake of the mod that adds a lot of different sounds. Screen effects, events, entities, and... the lobotomy itself
body:
# YOUR NUMBER IS 109

## About the Mod
This project is a full remake created from the ground up and is not a reupload of the original work. The remake focuses on rebuilding core systems, improving stability, optimizing performance, and expanding the original concept with additional mechanics and environmental events.


The player takes the role of a lobotomized patient attempting to live a normal life in an altered and unstable reality. Strange occurrences begin to appear over time — unexplained sounds, visual disturbances, and unexpected physical or psychological effects that make the world feel increasingly unreliable.

## Features
- Random atmospheric sound events that occur during gameplay
- Psychological visual anomalies, including sudden images and environmental disturbances
- Random temporary status effects that influence player perception
- Improved optimization and stability compared to the original project
- Rebuilt systems and mechanics implemented entirely from scratch

The remake was developed to address performance issues, incompatibilities, and unfinished features present in earlier versions of the concept. By rebuilding the project from the ground up, the mod aims to provide a smoother, more polished, and technically stable horror experience while preserving the core psychological atmosphere that inspired it.
